basic_details.job_title: ESIC Hospital Sahibabad Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 45 Super Specialists, Specialists, and Senior Residents Posts
basic_details.post_name: Super Specialists, Specialists, and Senior Residents
basic_details.short_information: The latest Employees State Insurance Corporation Sahibabad (ESIC) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Super Specialists, Specialists, and Senior Residents posts! Published at the official website, this new recruitment drive offers 45 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the age group up to 69 years for Super Specialists/Specialists and up to 45 years for Senior Residents, and possessing MBBS, PG Degree/Diploma, DM/MCh/DNB, or equivalent in the concerned specialty, can attend the walk-in interview on 18–19 May 2026. Find all details about the ESIC Super Specialists, Specialis

age_limit.age_details: Not exceeding 69 years for Super Specialists and Senior Residents, Not exceeding 45 years for Senior Residents.
age_limit.details: Super Specialist: Maximum age limit is 69 years. Age relaxation as per Rules for SC/ST/OBC/PwD. Full Time Contractual Specialist: Maximum age limit is 69 years. Age relaxation as per Rules for SC/ST/OBC/PwD. Part-Time Contractual Specialist: Maximum age limit is 69 years. Age relaxation as per Rules for SC/ST/OBC/PwD. Senior Resident: Maximum age limit is 45 years. Age relaxation as per Rules for SC/ST/OBC/PwD.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS, MD/MS/DNB, DM/Mch in concerned specialty, PG Degree/Diploma, MBBS with PG Degree/Diploma or equivalent, MBBS with 2 years experience.
qualification.details: Super Specialist: MBBS, MD/MS/DNB with DM/DNB in concerned Super Specialty from MCI recognized Medical College, with 3 years of experience. In case of holders of DM/Mch qualification of five years duration, the period of senior PG residency rendered in the last part of the said DM/Mch shall be counted towards requirements of 3 years' experience. Full Time Contractual Specialist: MBBS with PG Degree/Diploma in concerned specialty from a recognized university with 3 years' experience in a responsible position connected with the specialty after acquiring the PG degree or 5 years' experience after acquiring the PG Diploma. Part-Time Contractual Specialist: PG Degree or a Diploma in concerned specialty from recognized university with 3 years' experience after PG Degree or 5 years' experience after PG Diploma. Senior Resident: MBBS with PG Degree/DNB/Diploma or equivalent as per residency scheme in concerned specialty from recognized University/Institution. However, if PG Degree/DNB/Diploma doctors are not available, MBBS doctors without PG degree but with two years of experience, out of which 1 year of experience in the concerned specialty from government hospital/private hospital (not a private clinic) may be appointed for 01 year, as Senior Resident on contract basis.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Full Time/ Part-Time Contractual Specialist (Accident & Emergency (A&E) Department)
Full Time/ Part-Time Contractual Specialist (Obs & Gynae)

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 2,00,000/- per month (Super Specialist Entry Level), Rs. 100,000/- per month (Part Time Super Specialist Entry Level), Level-11 as per 7th CPC + Other allowances (Junior Specialist), Rs. 60,000/- per month (Part-Time contractual Specialist)
salary_details.details: Super Specialist (Entry Level): Rs. 2,00,000/- per month Part Time Super Specialist (Entry Level): Rs. 100,000/- per month Part Time Super Specialist (Additional remuneration for Emergency visit beyond 16 hrs/week): Rs 1200/- for every additional hours Junior Contractual Specialist: Level-11 as per 7th CPC + Other allowances as admissible under the rule, per month. Part-Time contractual Specialist: Rs 60,000/- (Rupees Sixty thousand) only per month. Part-Time contractual Specialist (Charges for Emergency visit, if willing): Rs 15,000/- Senior Resident: Level-11 as per 7th CPC + Other allowances as admissible under the rule, per month.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies announced by ESIC Hospital Sahibabad?
faq.answer: ESIC Hospital Sahibabad has announced a total of 45 vacancies for the posts of Super Specialists, Specialists, and Senior Residents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly with their documents.

faq.question: Q3. What are the important dates for the ESIC Hospital Sahibabad recruitment?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled to be held on 18th May 2026 and 19th May 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification required for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for the Senior Resident post is MBBS with a PG Degree/DNB/Diploma or equivalent in the concerned specialty from a recognized University/Institution.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for Super Specialists and Specialists?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for Super Specialists and Specialists is not exceeding 69 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Super Specialist post?
faq.answer: The salary for a Full Time Super Specialist is Rs. 2,00,000/- per month, and for a Part Time Super Specialist, it is Rs. 100,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for SC/ST candidates, as well as for PWD, Women Candidates, and Ex-Servicemen.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the office of the Medical Superintendent, ESIC Hospital, Sahibabad, Ghaziabad, UP.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be carried for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates need to bring their Bio-Data, photographs, original documents, self-attested photocopies of testimonials, Aadhar Card, PAN Card, and relevant registration certificates.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is on a contract basis.
